title: MassPay taps Coinbase to expand stablecoin payouts
summary: MassPay taps Coinbase to add USDC-powered cross-border payouts, betting stablecoin rails will cut costs and speed up settlement for businesses paying globally.

title: Franklin Templeton, BNP Paribas see tokenization boosting EU's capital efficiency
summary: Executives from Franklin Templeton and BNP Paribas say tokenized assets and stablecoins could improve capital efficiency across Europe as Wall Street expands tokenization efforts.

title: Stocks Jump as Trump Signals US-Iran Deal Is Close: Markets Wrap
summary: Wall Street traders drove stocks higher and oil fell as President Donald Trump canceled scheduled strikes against Iran and signaled a deal is near, fueling hopes for an end to the war that has roiled markets.

title: US Stocks Soar as Trump Says He’s Called Off New Iran Strikes
summary: US stocks rose to session highs following two straight losing days, as President Donald Trump said he’s called off planned military strikes on Iran, hours after threatening to escalate the three-month war.

title: BitGo Launches Lightning Earn to Let Institutions Put Bitcoin to Work on Lightning Network
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

BitGo Launches Lightning Earn to Let Institutions Put Bitcoin to Work on Lightning Network
BitGo launched Lightning Earn, enabling institutional bitcoin holders to earn BTC-denominated fees by providing Lightning Network liquidity through an integration with Amboss Rails.

title: Authorities Take Down 'AudiA6' Group That Allegedly Laundered $389 Million in Bitcoin
summary: Authorities are seeking extradition to the U.S. of two arrested individuals for allegedly laundering $389 million in Bitcoin.

title: World Cup Could Bring Billions in Volume to Prediction Markets in 'Watershed Moment': Bernstein
summary: The 48-team FIFA World Cup tournament is expected to be the single largest catalyst for online sports betting in history, Bernstein said.

title: JPMorgan says debasement trade retreat has ‘accelerated’ for bitcoin
summary: The retreat from the debasement trade has continued for gold and accelerated for bitcoin in recent weeks, JPMorgan analysts said.

title: Coinbase for Agents sets up dedicated accounts for AI bots to trade and pay for users
summary: AI agents will get access to trade, manage money, and make payments on behalf of Coinbase users via dedicated accounts.

title: Trump calls off Iran strikes planned for Thursday night
summary: US president cancels attacks citing progress in negotiations with Tehran

title: India protests to US after three sailors killed in tanker attack
summary: New Delhi calls for ‘de-escalation’ in Gulf but appears to have little appetite for confrontation with Washington
